title: 6 Months HR Admin (Up to $3,500)  #NJN
description:
Working Location: Pioneer
Working Hours: 8.30am - 5.45pm (Mon - Thurs), 8.30am - 5.15pm (Fri)

Responsibilities 

Executive & Secretarial Support: 

  • Provide comprehensive administrative support to Associate Chair (Faculty) including procurement, claims, travel arrangements, and document submissions. 
  • Provide secretariat support for committees and meetings, including booking of meeting rooms, agenda preparation, minute-taking, and follow-up actions. 
  • Maintain confidentiality and handle sensitive documentation with accuracy and discretion. 
  • Support digitalisation initiatives and contribute to streamlining workflows and improving service delivery. 
  • Maintain up-to-date records and assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, and internal communication materials. 
  • Liaise with internal departments (e.g., Finance, HR, Research Office) and external vendors to resolve, compliance, and process-related issues. 
  • Perform any other duties as assigned to support the team’s and school’s objectives. 

Faculty Recruitment, Appointment, Reappointment and Promotion Administration Support 

  • Datamining and profiling of potential international candidates; create database for easy references. 
  • Liaise with School’s HR and Shared Services team to advance Faculty appointment, re-appointment, promotion and tenure and related processes and ensure smooth execution of administrative process. 
  • Provide end to end support on faculty recruitment such as (but not limited to interview/ meeting scheduling, travel arrangement, campus visit and claims 
  • Support preparation of faculty dossier in appointment, re-appointment, promotion for Committee’s review and to ensure timely submission of documentation and compliance with University policies. 
  • Support annual faculty appraisal exercise to ensure adherence to timelines and processes. 
  • Maintain up-to-date records and assist in the preparation of reports, presentations, and internal communication materials 
  • Perform any other faculty-related duties as assigned to support the team’s and school’s objectives. 
  • Serve as key support to school management for faculty recruitment-related publicity materials. 


Jessica Nguyen Huynh Thanh Truc

CEI Reg. No. R23113787

EA License No. 99C4599

We regret that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Established since 1996, Recruit Express has emerged as the leading staffing solutions provider that has set a proven track record for matching the right people to the right organization within the shortest time. With our vast network of resources, extensive databases and defined recruitment processes, we have been successfully bridging talented job seekers of the highest calibre to employers who only want the best in their teams.


In our relentless pursuit of excellent service, we have adopted best practices and dynamic growth strategies in expanding our operations across the Asia Pacific regions: We have offices in Singapore, Sydney, Hong Kong, Kuala Lumpur, Taipei, Shanghai, Beijing, Tokyo and Bangkok.

With 400 permanent committed consultants from various professional backgrounds and disciplines, we make a difference by delivering top-notch services to our clients and candidates alike.
postedCompany.name: RECRUIT EXPRESS PTE LTD
